figures.caption: Figure 2: Per-subject results from the winning hyperparameter sweep evaluated on Chugh et al.’s dataset 2021

Figure 3: Success and failure cases across three eye trackers with different LED configurations. Images are from Chugh et al.’s dataset [Chugh et al. 2021], OpenEDS2019 [Garbin et al. 2019], and OpenEDS2020 [Palmero et al. 2020]. Blue circles are the detected glints while the green circles show template-projected positions based on the chosen candidate glints.
